item.title: WWII Veteran Recalls Discovering Concentration Camps
item.description: A WWII veteran reflects on the moment his unit discovered the concentration camps, offering a firsthand account of service and historical memory.

media:content.media:title: WWII Veteran Recalls Discovering Concentration Camps
media:content.media:description: A WWII veteran reflects on the moment his unit discovered the concentration camps, offering a firsthand account of service and historical memory.

item.title: My Beer Run During the Bulge
item.description: A veteran reflects on a beer run during the Battle of the Bulge, offering a firsthand wartime memory from the European front.

media:content.media:title: My Beer Run During the Bulge
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on a beer run during the Battle of the Bulge, offering a firsthand wartime memory from the European front.

item.title: The Most Dangerous WWII Battle Entry
item.description: A historical look at one of the most dangerous ways to enter battle in World War II, reflecting the risks faced by soldiers in combat.

media:content.media:title: The Most Dangerous WWII Battle Entry
media:content.media:description: A historical look at one of the most dangerous ways to enter battle in World War II, reflecting the risks faced by soldiers in combat.

item.title: The Trap Set for the Germans on D-Day
item.description: A firsthand D-Day account from an American veteran, reflecting on the plan, the mission, and the challenges faced on June 6, 1944.

media:content.media:title: The Trap Set for the Germans on D-Day
media:content.media:description: A firsthand D-Day account from an American veteran, reflecting on the plan, the mission, and the challenges faced on June 6, 1944.

item.title: Gene Kranz and the Apollo Mission Legacy
item.description: Gene Kranz led a team that helped achieve the Apollo program’s historic success. The American Veterans Center reflects on leadership, service, and preserving oral histories.

media:content.media:title: Gene Kranz and the Apollo Mission Legacy
media:content.media:description: Gene Kranz led a team that helped achieve the Apollo program’s historic success. The American Veterans Center reflects on leadership, service, and preserving oral histories.

item.title: Scout Snipers in Marine Corps History
item.description: A historical look at Marine scout snipers and their role on the battlefield, reflecting on service, skill, and the demands of war.

media:content.media:title: Scout Snipers in Marine Corps History
media:content.media:description: A historical look at Marine scout snipers and their role on the battlefield, reflecting on service, skill, and the demands of war.

item.title: A Veteran’s Account of Loss in War
item.description: A firsthand veteran account reflecting on the loss of two Marines and the lasting impact of war.

media:content.media:title: A Veteran’s Account of Loss in War
media:content.media:description: A firsthand veteran account reflecting on the loss of two Marines and the lasting impact of war.

item.title: American Veterans Center’s Annual Conference
item.description: For 29 years, the American Veterans Center has brought veterans together to share firsthand experiences with students from service academies and ROTC programs.

media:content.media:title: American Veterans Center’s Annual Conference
media:content.media:description: For 29 years, the American Veterans Center has brought veterans together to share firsthand experiences with students from service academies and ROTC programs.

item.title: Winter Warriors on the Rhine in WWII
item.description: A WWII story of winter combat along the Rhine River, highlighting the challenges, service, and endurance of American troops.

media:content.media:title: Winter Warriors on the Rhine in WWII
media:content.media:description: A WWII story of winter combat along the Rhine River, highlighting the challenges, service, and endurance of American troops.

item.title: Esteban Valenzuela’s Vietnam War Story
item.description: A Marine veteran reflects on combat in Vietnam, the loss of a close friend, and a 2025 return that helped him begin healing.

media:content.media:title: Esteban Valenzuela’s Vietnam War Story
media:content.media:description: A Marine veteran reflects on combat in Vietnam, the loss of a close friend, and a 2025 return that helped him begin healing.

item.title: What Mortar Rounds Smell Like in War
item.description: A veteran reflects on the sensory reality of mortar fire, offering a firsthand glimpse into the experience of war.

media:content.media:title: What Mortar Rounds Smell Like in War
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on the sensory reality of mortar fire, offering a firsthand glimpse into the experience of war.
